title: trema scaberrimum
intro: Trema scaberrimum, also known as the rough trema or rough nettle tree, is a plant species in the family Cannabaceae, native to Australia. The medicinal properties of Trema scaberrimum include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful for treating wounds, skin irritations, and fever. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and provide relief from fever and skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis. Trema scaberrimum is typically prepared as a herbal infusion or a tincture, and can also be used as a poultice or applied topically to the affected area.
